primary.title: Robots.txt Generator - Create Robots.txt Files Online
primary.description: Generate optimized robots.txt files for your site to control crawler access, direct search engines, and reference sitemaps. Free online robots builder.
primary.heading: Robots.txt Generator
primary.seo_content:
A Robots.txt Generator is a developer and SEO tool that formats text instructions for search engine web crawlers. The resulting robots.txt file sits at the root of a domain (e.g. tools.satex.fun/robots.txt) and tells bots (like Googlebot or Bingbot) which paths they are allowed or disallowed from crawling and indexing.

Using a robots.txt file is crucial to prevent search engines from crawling administration screens, duplicate content directories, or private member folders. Prefilling your robots.txt file with a link to your sitemap.xml ensures search bots discover all your web pages immediately.

examples.title: Generate standard robots.txt file
examples.description: Prefill your sitemap URL, enter directory paths you want blocked (like /admin/), select crawl pace delays, and download the output text file.

examples.title: Block specific crawler bots
examples.description: Uncheck specific crawlers from the configuration grid to explicitly instruct search engine crawlers (like Baiduspider or Yandexbot) to stay off your site.

faqs.question: Where should I upload the robots.txt file?
faqs.answer: You must upload the robots.txt file to the root directory of your website server. It must be accessible at: https://yourdomain.com/robots.txt.

faqs.question: Can robots.txt hide pages from showing up in Google Search?
faqs.answer: No. Robots.txt restricts crawling, not indexing. If another website links to a blocked URL, Google may still index the page without crawling it. To completely prevent indexing, use the 'noindex' meta tag instead.

robots-txt-builder.title: Robots.txt Builder - Custom Search Bot Directives
robots-txt-builder.description: Build robots.txt configurations to prevent index bloat and manage bot crawling traffic. Free online crawler directives tool.
robots-txt-builder.heading: Robots.txt Builder
robots-txt-builder.seo_content: The Robots.txt Builder is a visual generator that builds custom crawl rules for individual user agents. It helps webmasters structure directives that prevent server load spikes caused by aggressive crawling bots.

examples.title: Exclude staging folder
examples.description: Enter the staging or test folder name in the blocked paths input to create the Disallow command.

faqs.question: What is Crawl-delay?
faqs.answer: Crawl-delay is a directive that instructs bots to wait a specific number of seconds between page loads. While Bing and Yandex support this, Google does not, as Google manages crawl rates automatically in Search Console.

create-robots-txt.title: Create Robots.txt Online - Quick Config Generator
create-robots-txt.description: Create a standard robots.txt file with sitemap declarations for blogger, wordpress, or custom html websites.
create-robots-txt.heading: Create Robots.txt Online
create-robots-txt.seo_content: Creating a robots.txt file online allows you to specify sitemap listings and block bad bots instantly. This utility outputs clean, valid text compliant with the standard Robots Exclusion Protocol.

examples.title: Create default robots.txt with sitemap
examples.description: Enter your site sitemap XML path and copy the generated output to paste into your blogger or wordpress admin panels.

faqs.question: What is the correct syntax for a sitemap inside robots.txt?
faqs.answer: The sitemap directive is specified with a capitalized 'Sitemap' label, followed by a colon, a space, and the full absolute URL: Sitemap: https://example.com/sitemap.xml.
